summary: 0.6.30 is a narrow follow-up to 0.6.29 that turns the joystick button 5 override into a true grab-navigation handoff instead of a broad normal-navigation unlock.
operatorSignals: 0.6.29 re-enabled movement while the override was held, but it restored ordinary joystick locomotion instead of the intended grab-navigation behavior.
The requested action is still strictly the temporary navigation override seam, not a broader panel, playback, playlist, or deployment change.
actionsTaken: Kept the slice strictly inside the CUA input and focus seam.
Replaced the broad override release with a dedicated grab-navigation handoff state.
Kept ordinary locomotion disabled while the handoff is active, restored the original VaM navigation snapshot when it ends, and left the rest of the player untouched.
nonGoals: No A-B or transport policy changes.
